General.Name: Fy Financial Shenzhen Co Ltd
General.Description: FY Financial (Shenzhen) Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, provides finance leasing, sale leaseback, factoring, and advisory services in the People's Republic of China. It operates through Financial and Advisory Business, Trading Operation Business, and Energy Storage Business segments. The Financial and Advisory Business segment offers direct finance leasing, sale-leaseback transactions, factoring, and advisory services. Its Trading Operation Business segment engages in the trading of electronic products. The Energy Storage Business segment trades in energy storage systems; and provides energy storage solutions and services, and general construction services. The company is also involved in the research and development of commercial energy storage systems; customer referral and e-commerce services; supply of medical equipment; investment and asset management activities; tele-communication tower infrastructure business; information transmission, software, and information technology services; and wholesale and retail business. It serves fast moving consumer goods, electronic products, alternative energy, medical, transport, construction, decoration, property development, and machinery parts processing industries; and small-and-medium-sized enterprises. FY Financial (Shenzhen) Co., Ltd. was founded in 2012 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, the People's Republic of China.
